summary: The UI static checks step failed because the TypeScript compiler (tsc) returned a non-zero exit status while compiling the UI code under src/airflow/ui.
root_cause: TypeScript compilation failed: the command 'pnpm tsc --p /home/runner/work/airflow/airflow/airflow-core/src/airflow/ui/tmpkhdkxx97.json' exited with status 2.

evidence.reason: Shows the UI compile/format/lint step failed in the CI run.

evidence.quote: subprocess.CalledProcessError: Command '['pnpm', 'tsc', '--p', '/home/runner/work/airflow/airflow/airflow-core/src/airflow/ui/tmpkhdkxx97.json']' returned non-zero exit status 2.
evidence.reason: Direct error indicating the TypeScript compiler command failed and returned a non-zero exit status.
Shows the commands were being run in the UI package directory where tsc was invoked; confirms scope of failure.
Shows the temporary tsc project file being used to run tsc (the compile configuration that tsc used).

suggested_fix: Run the failing tsc command locally to see the full TypeScript error output: pnpm tsc --p /home/runner/work/airflow/airflow/airflow-core/src/airflow/ui/tmpkhdkxx97.json (or run pnpm --filter src/airflow/ui tsc if using workspace). Fix the reported TypeScript compilation/type errors or adjust tsconfig includes if files were added/moved, then re-run the precommit/static checks (prek) so pnpm tsc succeeds.
